summary.art: April 3, 2026: The international art fair ART OnO kicks off today at SETEC in Gangnam, running through April 5. The Busan International Gallery Art Fair (BAMA) is also currently underway in Busan.
summary.market: April 3, 2026: Financial markets are observing Good Friday and are generally closed. Investors continue to monitor global market sentiment following recent economic indicators and ongoing geopolitical tensions.
